positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a soaring celestial whale breaking through a nebula-filled sky. The whale's silhouette is elegant and dynamic, etched in deep sapphire blue and cosmic gold lines, contrasting sharply against an ultra-vibrant gradient background of ethereal purples, teal, and warm pinks. The composition must be centrally framed, allowing the whale to dominate the negative space. Use a clean, graphic, vector art style with strong linework and limited color palette application. The background texture should resemble cosmic dust and glowing gas clouds, perfect for screen printing. High contrast, symmetrical balance, symmetrical balance, perfect composition, celestial, cosmic, whale silhouette, vector art, minimalist, ethereal glow.
